 250→    private fun findFragments() {
 251→        val fragmentManager = supportFragmentManager
 252→        messageListFragment = fragmentManager.findFragmentById(R.id.message_list_container) as MessageListFragment?
 253→        messageViewContainerFragment =
 254→            fragmentManager.findFragmentByTag(FRAGMENT_TAG_MESSAGE_VIEW_CONTAINER) as MessageViewContainerFragment?
 255→
 256→        messageListFragment?.let { messageListFragment ->
 257→            messageViewContainerFragment?.setViewModel(messageListFragment.viewModel)
 258→            initializeFromLocalSearch(messageListFragment.localSearch)
 259→        }
 260→    }
 261→
 262→    private fun initializeFragments() {
 263→        val fragmentManager = supportFragmentManager
 264→        fragmentManager.addOnBackStackChangedListener(this)
 265→
 266→        val hasMessageListFragment = messageListFragment != null
 267→        if (!hasMessageListFragment) {
 268→            val fragmentTransaction = fragmentManager.beginTransaction()
 269→            val messageListFragment = MessageListFragment.newInstance(
 270→                search!!,
 271→                false,
 272→                K9.isThreadedViewEnabled && !noThreading,
 273→            )
 274→            fragmentTransaction.add(R.id.message_list_container, messageListFragment)
 275→            fragmentTransaction.commitNow()
 276→
 277→            this.messageListFragment = messageListFragment
 278→        }
 279→
 280→        // Check if the fragment wasn't restarted and has a MessageReference in the arguments.
 281→        // If so, open the referenced message.
 282→        if (!hasMessageListFragment && messageViewContainerFragment == null && messageReference != null) {
 283→            openMessage(messageReference!!)
 284→        }
 285→    }

 287→    /**
 288→     * Set the initial display mode (message list, message view, or split view).
 289→     *
 290→     * **Note:**
 291→     * This method has to be called after [.findFragments] because the result depends on
 292→     * the availability of a [MessageViewFragment] instance.
 293→     */
 294→    private fun initializeDisplayMode(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 295→        if (useSplitView()) {
 296→            displayMode = DisplayMode.SPLIT_VIEW
 297→            return
 298→        }
 299→
 300→        if (savedInstanceState != null) {
 301→            val savedDisplayMode = BundleCompat.getSerializable(
 302→                savedInstanceState,
 303→                STATE_DISPLAY_MODE,
 304→                DisplayMode::class.java,
 305→            )
 306→
 307→            if (savedDisplayMode != null && savedDisplayMode != DisplayMode.SPLIT_VIEW) {
 308→                displayMode = savedDisplayMode
 309→                return
 310→            }
 311→        }
 312→
 313→        displayMode = if (messageViewContainerFragment != null || messageReference != null) {
 314→            DisplayMode.MESSAGE_VIEW
 315→        } else {
 316→            DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST
 317→        }
 318→    }
 319→
 320→    private fun useSplitView(): Boolean {
 321→        val splitViewMode = K9.splitViewMode
 322→        val orientation = resources.configuration.orientation
 323→        return splitViewMode === SplitViewMode.ALWAYS ||
 324→            splitViewMode === SplitViewMode.WHEN_IN_LANDSCAPE && orientation == Configuration.ORIENTATION_LANDSCAPE
 325→    }

 327→    private fun initializeLayout() {
 328→        progressBar = findViewById(R.id.message_list_progress)
 329→        messageViewPlaceHolder = PlaceholderFragment()
 330→    }

 332→    private fun displayViews() {
 333→        when (displayMode) {
 334→            DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST -> {
 335→                showMessageList()
 336→            }
 337→
 338→            DisplayMode.MESSAGE_VIEW -> {
 339→                showMessageView()
 340→            }
 341→
 342→            DisplayMode.SPLIT_VIEW -> {
 343→                val messageListFragment = checkNotNull(this.messageListFragment)
 344→
 345→                messageListWasDisplayed = true
 346→                messageListFragment.setFullyActive()
 347→
 348→                messageViewContainerFragment.let { messageViewContainerFragment ->
 349→                    if (messageViewContainerFragment == null) {
 350→                        showMessageViewPlaceHolder()
 351→                    } else {
 352→                        messageViewContainerFragment.isActive = true
 353→                    }
 354→                }
 355→
 356→                setDrawerLockState()
 357→                onMessageListDisplayed()
 358→            }
 359→        }
 360→    }

 362→    private fun decodeExtras(intent: Intent): Boolean {
 363→        val launchData = decodeExtrasToLaunchData(intent)
 364→
 365→        // If Unified Inbox was disabled show default account instead
 366→        val search = if (launchData.search.isUnifiedInbox && !K9.isShowUnifiedInbox) {
 367→            createDefaultLocalSearch()
 368→        } else {
 369→            launchData.search
 370→        }
 371→
 372→        // If no account has been specified, keep the currently active account when opening the Unified Inbox
 373→        val account = launchData.account
 374→            ?: account?.takeIf { launchData.search.isUnifiedInbox }
 375→            ?: search.firstAccount()
 376→
 377→        if (account == null) {
 378→            finish()
 379→            return false
 380→        }
 381→
 382→        this.account = account
 383→        this.search = search
 384→        singleFolderMode = search.folderIds.size == 1
 385→        noThreading = launchData.noThreading
 386→        messageReference = launchData.messageReference
 387→        messageViewOnly = launchData.messageViewOnly
 388→
 389→        return true
 390→    }
 391→
 392→    private fun decodeExtrasToLaunchData(intent: Intent): LaunchData {
 393→        val action = intent.action
 394→        val queryString = intent.getStringExtra(SearchManager.QUERY)
 395→
 396→        if (action == ACTION_SHORTCUT) {
 397→            // Handle shortcut intents
 398→            val specialFolder = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_SPECIAL_FOLDER)
 399→            if (specialFolder == SearchAccount.UNIFIED_INBOX) {
 400→                return LaunchData(search = createSearchAccount().relatedSearch)
 401→            }
 402→
 403→            val accountUuid = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_ACCOUNT)
 404→            if (accountUuid != null) {
 405→                val account = accountManager.getAccount(accountUuid)
 406→                if (account == null) {
 407→                    Timber.d("Account %s not found.", accountUuid)
 408→                    return LaunchData(createDefaultLocalSearch())
 409→                }
 410→
 411→                val folderId = defaultFolderProvider.getDefaultFolder(account)
 412→                val search = LocalSearch().apply {
 413→                    addAccountUuid(accountUuid)
 414→                    addAllowedFolder(folderId)
 415→                }
 416→
 417→                return LaunchData(search = search)
 418→            }
 419→        } else if (action == Intent.ACTION_SEARCH && queryString != null) {
 420→            // Query was received from Search Dialog
 421→            val query = queryString.trim()
 422→
 423→            val search = LocalSearch().apply {
 424→                isManualSearch = true
 425→                or(
 426→                    SearchCondition(
 427→                        SearchField.SENDER,
 428→                        SearchAttribute.CONTAINS,
 429→                        query,
 430→                    ),
 431→                )
 432→                or(
 433→                    SearchCondition(
 434→                        SearchField.TO,
 435→                        SearchAttribute.CONTAINS,
 436→                        query,
 437→                    ),
 438→                )
 439→                or(
 440→                    SearchCondition(
 441→                        SearchField.CC,
 442→                        SearchAttribute.CONTAINS,
 443→                        query,
 444→                    ),
 445→                )
 446→                or(
 447→                    SearchCondition(
 448→                        SearchField.BCC,
 449→                        SearchAttribute.CONTAINS,
 450→                        query,
 451→                    ),
 452→                )
 453→                or(
 454→                    SearchCondition(
 455→                        SearchField.SUBJECT,
 456→                        SearchAttribute.CONTAINS,
 457→                        query,
 458→                    ),
 459→                )
 460→                or(
 461→                    SearchCondition(
 462→                        SearchField.MESSAGE_CONTENTS,
 463→                        SearchAttribute.CONTAINS,
 464→                        query,
 465→                    ),
 466→                )
 467→            }
 468→
 469→            val appData = intent.getBundleExtra(SearchManager.APP_DATA)
 470→            if (appData != null) {
 471→                val searchAccountUuid = appData.getString(EXTRA_SEARCH_ACCOUNT)
 472→                if (searchAccountUuid != null) {
 473→                    search.addAccountUuid(searchAccountUuid)
 474→                    // searches started from a folder list activity will provide an account, but no folder
 475→                    if (appData.containsKey(EXTRA_SEARCH_FOLDER)) {
 476→                        val folderId = appData.getLong(EXTRA_SEARCH_FOLDER)
 477→                        search.addAllowedFolder(folderId)
 478→                    }
 479→                } else if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
 480→                    throw AssertionError("Invalid app data in search intent")
 481→                }
 482→            }
 483→
 484→            return LaunchData(
 485→                search = search,
 486→                noThreading = true,
 487→            )
 488→        } else if (intent.hasExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE_REFERENCE)) {
 489→            val messageReferenceString = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE_REFERENCE)
 490→            val messageReference = MessageReference.parse(messageReferenceString)
 491→
 492→            if (messageReference != null) {
 493→                val search = if (intent.hasByteArrayExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH)) {
 494→                    ParcelableUtil.unmarshall(intent.getByteArrayExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH), LocalSearch.CREATOR)
 495→                } else {
 496→                    messageReference.toLocalSearch()
 497→                }
 498→
 499→                return LaunchData(
 500→                    search = search,
 501→                    messageReference = messageReference,
 502→                    messageViewOnly = intent.getBooleanExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE_VIEW_ONLY, false),
 503→                )
 504→            }
 505→        } else if (intent.hasByteArrayExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH)) {
 506→            // regular LocalSearch object was passed
 507→            val search = ParcelableUtil.unmarshall(intent.getByteArrayExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH), LocalSearch.CREATOR)
 508→            val noThreading = intent.getBooleanExtra(EXTRA_NO_THREADING, false)
 509→            val account = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_ACCOUNT)?.let { accountUuid ->
 510→                accountManager.getAccount(accountUuid)
 511→            }
 512→
 513→            return LaunchData(search = search, account = account, noThreading = noThreading)
 514→        }
 515→
 516→        // Default action
 517→        val search = if (K9.isShowUnifiedInbox) {
 518→            createSearchAccount().relatedSearch
 519→        } else {
 520→            createDefaultLocalSearch()
 521→        }
 522→
 523→        return LaunchData(search)
 524→    }
 525→
 526→    private fun createDefaultLocalSearch(): LocalSearch {
 527→        val account = preferences.defaultAccount ?: error("No default account available")
 528→        return LocalSearch().apply {
 529→            addAccountUuid(account.uuid)
 530→            addAllowedFolder(defaultFolderProvider.getDefaultFolder(account))
 531→        }
 532→    }

 593→    private fun initializeFolderDrawer() {

 597→            openFolder = { folderId -> openFolder(folderId) },

 605→    private fun createDrawerListener(): DrawerListener {
 606→        return object : DrawerListener {
 607→            override fun onDrawerClosed(drawerView: View) {
 608→                if (openFolderTransaction != null) {
 609→                    commitOpenFolderTransaction()
 610→                }
 611→            }
 612→
 613→            override fun onDrawerStateChanged(newState: Int) = Unit
 614→
 615→            override fun onDrawerOpened(drawerView: View) {
 616→                collapseSearchView()
 617→                messageListFragment?.finishActionMode()
 618→            }
 619→
 620→            override fun onDrawerSlide(drawerView: View, slideOffset: Float) = Unit
 621→        }
 622→    }

 624→    private fun openFolder(folderId: Long) {

 629→
 630→        val search = LocalSearch()
 631→        search.addAccountUuid(account!!.uuid)
 632→        search.addAllowedFolder(folderId)
 633→
 634→        performSearch(search)
 635→    }

 642→    private fun commitOpenFolderTransaction() {
 643→        openFolderTransaction!!.commit()
 644→        openFolderTransaction = null
 645→
 646→        messageListFragment!!.setFullyActive()
 647→
 648→        onMessageListDisplayed()
 649→    }

 660→    private fun launchManageFoldersScreen() {
 661→        if (account == null) {
 662→            Timber.e("Tried to open \"Manage folders\", but no account selected!")

 669→    fun openRealAccount(accountId: String) {
 670→        val account = accountManager.getAccount(accountId) ?: return
 671→        val folderId = defaultFolderProvider.getDefaultFolder(account)
 672→
 673→        val search = LocalSearch()
 674→        search.addAllowedFolder(folderId)
 675→        search.addAccountUuid(account.uuid)
 676→        actionDisplaySearch(this, search, noThreading = false, newTask = false)
 677→    }
 678→
 679→    private fun performSearch(search: LocalSearch) {
 680→        initializeFromLocalSearch(search)
 681→
 682→        val fragmentManager = supportFragmentManager
 683→
 684→        check(!(BuildConfig.DEBUG && fragmentManager.backStackEntryCount > 0)) {
 685→            "Don't call performSearch() while there are fragments on the back stack"
 686→        }
 687→
 688→        val openFolderTransaction = fragmentManager.beginTransaction()
 689→        val messageListFragment = MessageListFragment.newInstance(search, false, K9.isThreadedViewEnabled)
 690→        openFolderTransaction.replace(R.id.message_list_container, messageListFragment)
 691→
 692→        this.messageListFragment = messageListFragment
 693→        this.openFolderTransaction = openFolderTransaction
 694→    }

 696→    protected open val isDrawerEnabled: Boolean = true
 697→
 698→    override fun dispatchKeyEvent(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
 699→        var eventHandled = false
 700→        if (event.action == KeyEvent.ACTION_DOWN && isSearchViewCollapsed()) {
 701→            eventHandled = onCustomKeyDown(event)
 702→        }
 703→
 704→        if (!eventHandled) {
 705→            eventHandled = super.dispatchKeyEvent(event)
 706→        }
 707→
 708→        return eventHandled
 709→    }
 710→
 711→    override fun onBackPressed() {
 712→        if (isDrawerEnabled && navigationDrawer!!.isOpen) {
 713→            navigationDrawer!!.close()
 714→        } else if (displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_VIEW) {
 715→            if (messageViewOnly) {
 716→                finish()
 717→            } else {
 718→                showMessageList()
 719→            }
 720→        } else if (!isSearchViewCollapsed()) {
 721→            collapseSearchView()
 722→        } else {
 723→            if (isDrawerEnabled && account != null && supportFragmentManager.backStackEntryCount == 0) {
 724→                if (K9.isShowUnifiedInbox) {
 725→                    if (search!!.id != SearchAccount.UNIFIED_INBOX) {
 726→                        openUnifiedInbox()
 727→                    } else {
 728→                        super.onBackPressed()
 729→                    }
 730→                } else {
 731→                    val defaultFolderId = defaultFolderProvider.getDefaultFolder(account!!)
 732→                    val currentFolder = if (singleFolderMode) search!!.folderIds[0] else null
 733→                    if (currentFolder == null || defaultFolderId != currentFolder) {
 734→                        openFolderImmediately(defaultFolderId)
 735→                    } else {
 736→                        super.onBackPressed()
 737→                    }
 738→                }
 739→            } else {
 740→                super.onBackPressed()
 741→            }
 742→        }

 745→    /**
 746→     * Handle hotkeys
 747→     *
 748→     * This method is called by [.dispatchKeyEvent] before any view had the chance to consume this key event.
 749→     *
 750→     * @return `true` if this event was consumed.
 751→     */
 752→    private fun onCustomKeyDown(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
 753→        if (!event.hasNoModifiers()) return false
 754→
 755→        when (event.keyCode) {
 756→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP -> {
 757→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null && displayMode != DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST &&
 758→                    K9.isUseVolumeKeysForNavigation
 759→                ) {
 760→                    showPreviousMessage()
 761→                    return true
 762→                }
 763→            }
 764→
 765→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_DOWN -> {
 766→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null && displayMode != DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST &&
 767→                    K9.isUseVolumeKeysForNavigation
 768→                ) {
 769→                    showNextMessage()
 770→                    return true
 771→                }
 772→            }
 773→
 774→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DEL -> {
 775→                onDeleteHotKey()
 776→                return true
 777→            }
 778→
 779→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_LEFT -> {
 780→                return if (messageViewContainerFragment != null && displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_VIEW) {
 781→                    showPreviousMessage()
 782→                } else {
 783→                    false
 784→                }
 785→            }
 786→
 787→            KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_RIGHT -> {
 788→                return if (messageViewContainerFragment != null && displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_VIEW) {
 789→                    showNextMessage()
 790→                } else {
 791→                    false
 792→                }
 793→            }
 794→        }
 795→
 796→        when (if (event.unicodeChar != 0) event.unicodeChar.toChar() else null) {
 797→            'c' -> {
 798→                messageListFragment!!.onCompose()
 799→                return true
 800→            }
 801→
 802→            'o' -> {
 803→                messageListFragment!!.onCycleSort()
 804→                return true
 805→            }
 806→
 807→            'i' -> {
 808→                messageListFragment!!.onReverseSort()
 809→                return true
 810→            }
 811→
 812→            'd' -> {
 813→                onDeleteHotKey()
 814→                return true
 815→            }
 816→
 817→            's' -> {
 818→                messageListFragment!!.toggleMessageSelect()
 819→                return true
 820→            }
 821→
 822→            'g' -> {
 823→                if (displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST) {
 824→                    messageListFragment!!.onToggleFlagged()
 825→                } else if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 826→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onToggleFlagged()
 827→                }
 828→                return true
 829→            }
 830→
 831→            'm' -> {
 832→                if (displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST) {
 833→                    messageListFragment!!.onMove()
 834→                } else if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 835→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onMove()
 836→                }
 837→                return true
 838→            }
 839→
 840→            'v' -> {
 841→                if (displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST) {
 842→                    messageListFragment!!.onArchive()
 843→                } else if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 844→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onArchive()
 845→                }
 846→                return true
 847→            }
 848→
 849→            'y' -> {
 850→                if (displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST) {
 851→                    messageListFragment!!.onCopy()
 852→                } else if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 853→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onCopy()
 854→                }
 855→                return true
 856→            }
 857→
 858→            'z' -> {
 859→                if (displayMode == DisplayMode.MESSAGE_LIST) {
 860→                    messageListFragment!!.onToggleRead()
 861→                } else if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 862→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onToggleRead()
 863→                }
 864→                return true
 865→            }
 866→
 867→            'f' -> {
 868→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 869→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onForward()
 870→                }
 871→                return true
 872→            }
 873→
 874→            'a' -> {
 875→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 876→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onReplyAll()
 877→                }
 878→                return true
 879→            }
 880→
 881→            'r' -> {
 882→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 883→                    messageViewContainerFragment!!.onReply()
 884→                }
 885→                return true
 886→            }
 887→
 888→            'j', 'p' -> {
 889→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 890→                    showPreviousMessage()
 891→                }
 892→                return true
 893→            }
 894→
 895→            'n', 'k' -> {
 896→                if (messageViewContainerFragment != null) {
 897→                    showNextMessage()
 898→                }
 899→                return true
 900→            }
 901→        }
 902→
 903→        return false
 904→    }

1126→    override fun startSearch(query: String, account: Account?, folderId: Long?): Boolean {

1130→            Bundle().apply {

1133→            }
1134→        } else {
1135→            // TODO Handle the case where we're searching from within a search result.
1136→            null
1137→        }
1138→        val searchIntent = Intent(this, Search::class.java).apply {
1139→            action = Intent.ACTION_SEARCH
1140→            putExtra(SearchManager.QUERY, query)
1141→            putExtra(SearchManager.APP_DATA, appData)
1142→        }
1143→        startActivity(searchIntent)
1144→
1145→        return true
1146→    }

1400→            search!!.id == SearchAccount.UNIFIED_INBOX && !K9.isShowUnifiedInbox -> drawer.deselect()

1455→        @JvmStatic

1467→        @JvmStatic
1468→        fun intentDisplaySearch(
1469→            context: Context?,
1470→            search: SearchSpecification?,
1471→            noThreading: Boolean,
1472→            newTask: Boolean,
1473→            clearTop: Boolean,
1474→        ): Intent {
1475→            return Intent(context, MessageList::class.java).apply {
1476→                putExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH, ParcelableUtil.marshall(search))
1477→                putExtra(EXTRA_NO_THREADING, noThreading)
1478→
1479→                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP)
1480→
1481→                if (clearTop) addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP)
1482→                if (newTask) addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)

1492→                    unifiedInboxTitle = coreResourceProvider.searchUnifiedInboxTitle(),
1493→                    unifiedInboxDetail = coreResourceProvider.searchUnifiedInboxDetail(),
1494→                ).relatedSearch
1495→
1496→                putExtra(EXTRA_ACCOUNT, account.uuid)
1497→                putExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH, ParcelableUtil.marshall(search))
1498→                putExtra(EXTRA_NO_THREADING, false)
1499→
1500→                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP)
1501→                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP)
1502→                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
1503→            }
1504→        }

1510→                and(SearchField.NEW_MESSAGE, "1", SearchAttribute.EQUALS)

1562→                    putExtra(EXTRA_SEARCH, ParcelableUtil.marshall(search))

1→package app.k9mail.feature.navigation.drawer.ui
 2→
 3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 4→import androidx.compose.runtime.LaunchedEffect
 5→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.mvi.observe
 6→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.molecule.PullToRefreshBox
 7→import app.k9mail.feature.navigation.drawer.FolderDrawerState
 8→import app.k9mail.feature.navigation.drawer.ui.DrawerContract.Effect
 9→import app.k9mail.feature.navigation.drawer.ui.DrawerContract.Event
10→import app.k9mail.feature.navigation.drawer.ui.DrawerContract.ViewModel
11→import org.koin.androidx.compose.koinViewModel
12→
13→@Composable
14→internal fun DrawerView(
15→    drawerState: FolderDrawerState,
16→    openAccount: (accountId: String) -> Unit,
17→    openFolder: (folderId: Long) -> Unit,
18→    openUnifiedFolder: () -> Unit,
19→    openManageFolders: () -> Unit,
20→    openSettings: () -> Unit,
21→    closeDrawer: () -> Unit,
22→    viewModel: ViewModel = koinViewModel<DrawerViewModel>(),
23→) {
24→    val (state, dispatch) = viewModel.observe { effect ->
25→        when (effect) {
26→            is Effect.OpenAccount -> openAccount(effect.accountId)
27→            is Effect.OpenFolder -> openFolder(effect.folderId)
28→            Effect.OpenUnifiedFolder -> openUnifiedFolder()
29→            is Effect.OpenManageFolders -> openManageFolders()
30→            is Effect.OpenSettings -> openSettings()
31→            Effect.CloseDrawer -> closeDrawer()
32→        }
33→    }
34→
35→    LaunchedEffect(drawerState.selectedAccountUuid) {
36→        dispatch(Event.SelectAccount(drawerState.selectedAccountUuid))
37→    }
38→
39→    LaunchedEffect(drawerState.selectedFolderId) {
40→        dispatch(Event.SelectFolder(drawerState.selectedFolderId))
41→    }
42→
43→    PullToRefreshBox(
44→        isRefreshing = state.value.isLoading,
45→        onRefresh = { dispatch(Event.OnSyncAccount) },
46→    ) {
47→        DrawerContent(
48→            state = state.value,
49→            onEvent = { dispatch(it) },
50→        )
51→    }
52→}

1→package com.fsck.k9.preferences
  2→
  3→import com.fsck.k9.helper.mapCollectionToSet
  4→import com.fsck.k9.preferences.ServerSettingsDescriptions.AUTHENTICATION_TYPE
  5→import com.fsck.k9.preferences.ServerSettingsDescriptions.HOST
  6→import com.fsck.k9.preferences.ServerSettingsDescriptions.PASSWORD
  7→import com.fsck.k9.preferences.ServerSettingsDescriptions.USERNAME
  8→import com.fsck.k9.preferences.Settings.InvalidSettingValueException
  9→import java.io.InputStream
 10→import timber.log.Timber
 11→
 12→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 13→class SettingsImporter internal constructor(
 14→    private val settingsFileParser: SettingsFileParser,
 15→    private val generalSettingsValidator: GeneralSettingsValidator,
 16→    private val accountSettingsValidator: AccountSettingsValidator,
 17→    private val generalSettingsUpgrader: GeneralSettingsUpgrader,
 18→    private val accountSettingsUpgrader: AccountSettingsUpgrader,
 19→    private val generalSettingsWriter: GeneralSettingsWriter,
 20→    private val accountSettingsWriter: AccountSettingsWriter,
 21→    private val unifiedInboxConfigurator: UnifiedInboxConfigurator,
 22→) {
 23→    /**
 24→     * Parses an import [InputStream] and returns information on whether it contains global settings and/or account
 25→     * settings. For all account configurations found, the name of the account along with the account UUID is returned.
 26→     *
 27→     * @param inputStream An `InputStream` to read the settings from.
 28→     *
 29→     * @return An [ImportContents] instance containing information about the contents of the settings file.
 30→     *
 31→     * @throws SettingsImportExportException In case of an error.
 32→     */
 33→    @Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "ThrowsCount")
 34→    @Throws(SettingsImportExportException::class)
 35→    fun getImportStreamContents(inputStream: InputStream): ImportContents {
 36→        try {
 37→            val imported = settingsFileParser.parseSettings(inputStream)
 38→
 39→            // If the stream contains global settings the "globalSettings" member will not be null
 40→            val globalSettings = (imported.globalSettings != null)
 41→
 42→            val accounts = imported.accounts.map { importedAccount ->
 43→                AccountDescription(
 44→                    name = getAccountDisplayName(importedAccount),
 45→                    uuid = importedAccount.uuid,
 46→                )
 47→            }
 48→
 49→            if (!globalSettings && accounts.isEmpty()) {
 50→                throw SettingsImportExportException("Neither global settings nor account settings could be found")
 51→            }
 52→
 53→            return ImportContents(globalSettings, accounts)
 54→        } catch (e: SettingsImportExportException) {
 55→            throw e
 56→        } catch (e: Exception) {
 57→            throw SettingsImportExportException(e)
 58→        }
 59→    }
 60→
 61→    /**
 62→     * Reads an import [InputStream] and imports the global settings and/or account configurations specified by the
 63→     * arguments.
 64→     *
 65→     * @param inputStream The `InputStream` to read the settings from.
 66→     * @param globalSettings `true` if global settings should be imported from the file.
 67→     * @param accountUuids A list of UUIDs of the accounts that should be imported.
 68→     *
 69→     * @return An [ImportResults] instance containing information about errors and successfully imported accounts.
 70→     *
 71→     * @throws SettingsImportExportException In case of an error.
 72→     */
 73→    @Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught")
 74→    @Throws(SettingsImportExportException::class)
 75→    fun importSettings(
 76→        inputStream: InputStream,
 77→        globalSettings: Boolean,
 78→        accountUuids: List<String>,
 79→    ): ImportResults {
 80→        try {
 81→            var globalSettingsImported = false
 82→            val importedAccounts = mutableListOf<AccountDescriptionPair>()
 83→            val erroneousAccounts = mutableListOf<AccountDescription>()
 84→
 85→            val allContents = settingsFileParser.parseSettings(inputStream)
 86→
 87→            val contents = filterSettings(allContents, globalSettings, accountUuids)
 88→
 89→            if (contents.globalSettings != null) {
 90→                globalSettingsImported = importGeneralSettings(contents.contentVersion, contents.globalSettings)
 91→            }
 92→
 93→            for (account in contents.accounts) {
 94→                try {
 95→                    val importResult = importAccount(contents.contentVersion, account)
 96→                    importedAccounts.add(importResult)
 97→                } catch (e: InvalidSettingValueException) {
 98→                    Timber.e(e, "Encountered invalid setting while importing account \"%s\"", account.name)
 99→
100→                    erroneousAccounts.add(AccountDescription(account.name!!, account.uuid))
101→                } catch (e: Exception) {
102→                    Timber.e(e, "Exception while importing account \"%s\"", account.name)
103→
104→                    erroneousAccounts.add(AccountDescription(account.name!!, account.uuid))
105→                }
106→            }
107→
108→            if (!globalSettingsImported) {
109→                unifiedInboxConfigurator.configureUnifiedInbox()
110→            }
111→
112→            return ImportResults(globalSettingsImported, importedAccounts, erroneousAccounts)
113→        } catch (e: SettingsImportExportException) {
114→            throw e
115→        } catch (e: Exception) {
116→            throw SettingsImportExportException(e)
117→        }
118→    }
119→
120→    private fun filterSettings(
121→        contents: SettingsFile.Contents,
122→        importGeneralSettings: Boolean,
123→        importAccountUuids: List<String>,
124→    ): SettingsFile.Contents {
125→        if (importGeneralSettings && contents.globalSettings == null) {
126→            Timber.w("Was asked to import global settings but none found.")
127→        }
128→
129→        val accountUuids = contents.accounts.mapCollectionToSet { it.uuid }
130→        for (importAccountUuid in importAccountUuids) {
131→            if (importAccountUuid !in accountUuids) {
132→                Timber.w("Was asked to import account %s. But this account wasn't found.", importAccountUuid)
133→            }
134→        }
135→
136→        return contents.copy(
137→            globalSettings = contents.globalSettings.takeIf { importGeneralSettings },
138→            accounts = contents.accounts.filter { it.uuid in importAccountUuids },
139→        )
140→    }
141→
142→    @Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught")
143→    private fun importGeneralSettings(contentVersion: Int, settings: SettingsMap): Boolean {
144→        return try {
145→            val validatedSettings = generalSettingsValidator.validate(contentVersion, settings)
146→
147→            val currentSettings = generalSettingsUpgrader.upgrade(contentVersion, validatedSettings)
148→
149→            generalSettingsWriter.write(currentSettings)
150→        } catch (e: Exception) {
151→            Timber.e(e, "Exception while importing general settings")
152→            false
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    private fun importAccount(
157→        contentVersion: Int,
158→        account: SettingsFile.Account,
159→    ): AccountDescriptionPair {
160→        val validatedAccount = accountSettingsValidator.validate(contentVersion, account)
161→
162→        val currentAccount = accountSettingsUpgrader.upgrade(contentVersion, validatedAccount)
163→
164→        val accountMapping = accountSettingsWriter.write(currentAccount)
165→
166→        val incoming = currentAccount.incoming
167→        val incomingServerName = incoming.settings[HOST] as? String
168→        val incomingAuthenticationType = incoming.settings[AUTHENTICATION_TYPE] as String
169→        val incomingPassword = incoming.settings[PASSWORD] as? String
170→        val incomingPasswordNeeded =
171→            incomingAuthenticationType != "EXTERNAL" && incomingAuthenticationType != "XOAUTH2" &&
172→                incomingPassword.isNullOrEmpty()
173→
174→        var authorizationNeeded = incomingAuthenticationType == "XOAUTH2"
175→
176→        val outgoing = currentAccount.outgoing
177→        val outgoingServerName = outgoing.settings[HOST] as? String
178→        val outgoingAuthenticationType = outgoing.settings[AUTHENTICATION_TYPE] as String
179→        val outgoingUsername = outgoing.settings[USERNAME] as String
180→        val outgoingPassword = outgoing.settings[PASSWORD] as? String
181→        val outgoingPasswordNeeded =
182→            outgoingAuthenticationType != "EXTERNAL" && outgoingAuthenticationType != "XOAUTH2" &&
183→                outgoingUsername.isNotEmpty() && outgoingPassword.isNullOrEmpty()
184→
185→        authorizationNeeded = authorizationNeeded || outgoingAuthenticationType == "XOAUTH2"
186→
187→        return AccountDescriptionPair(
188→            accountMapping.first,
189→            accountMapping.second,
190→            authorizationNeeded,
191→            incomingPasswordNeeded,
192→            outgoingPasswordNeeded,
193→            incomingServerName!!,
194→            outgoingServerName!!,
195→        )
196→    }
197→
198→    private fun getAccountDisplayName(account: SettingsFile.Account): String {
199→        return account.name?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
200→            ?: account.identities?.firstOrNull()?.email
201→            ?: error("Account name missing")
202→    }
203→}
